## Summary

- Problem:
- Solution:
- User or compatibility impact:

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Release

## Validation

- [ ] I ran the tests and static checks relevant to this change
- [ ] I checked OpenAPI/API compatibility when HTTP behavior changed
- [ ] I checked wheel or Docker behavior when packaging or deployment changed
- [ ] I ran `python scripts/privacy_audit.py` and did not add private data or credentials
- [ ] I updated documentation and migration notes when a public contract changed

## Evidence and safety

- [ ] Real-provider failures remain visible and do not fall back to simulated data
- [ ] Simulated records remain explicitly labelled
- [ ] Source IDs, warnings, and verification boundaries are preserved

## Notes

Add reviewer context, known limitations, migration impact, or follow-up work.
